_comment: Tests Bob Ward Physio's passthrough-only node: every booking routes directly to Standard Appointment with zero gate, zero spoken output unless CONCERN-GUIDED fires (explicit symptom vocabulary triggers empathetic line + tool call).

scenarios.name: Generic booking request — silent direct route, no gate

history.content: I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with appointment_type_id='1406607806622081880', appointment_type='Standard Appointment', variant_type='standard', with zero spoken output. FAIL if agent asks a new/existing gate, asks any question, or speaks any text before the tool call.

scenarios.name: Caller with explicit symptom — empathetic line then silent tool call in same turn

history.content: My back is killing me and I need to see someone.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks exactly one empathetic constant ('Sorry to hear that.' or 'That's no good.' or 'Let's get that looked at.' or 'We can definitely help with that.') immediately followed by universal_router intent='confirm_service' with appointment_type_id='1406607806622081880' in the SAME turn, with no other words between the empathetic line and the tool call. FAIL if agent asks a gate question, adds bridge phrases after the empathetic constant, or omits either the spoken line or the tool call.

scenarios.name: Caller states 'I'm a new patient' — still routes directly, no gate

history.content: I'm a new patient and I'd like to book an appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with appointment_type_id='1406607806622081880', appointment_type='Standard Appointment', variant_type='standard'. FAIL if agent asks a new/existing gate question or asks any other question before routing.
